name: Recipe card
when_to_use: 需要把一道菜的成品封面、时间/份量等元信息、配料和有序步骤整合成可直接阅读的交付卡片时用它，适合食谱答案、菜单内容和烹饪说明。若要比较多道菜的营养指标，应改用表格；若流程有分支、计时器或实时状态，应改用专用烹饪应用。
why_valuable: 纯 Markdown 食谱容易让配料与步骤混在一起，份量和耗时也不醒目；本模板用封面 hero、meta badges、勾选式配料列表和自动编号步骤建立稳定层级，同时允许完全零请求的 emoji 或 data:image 封面。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to combine a finished dish cover, metadata such as time and servings, ingredients, and ordered instructions into a directly readable delivery card, suitable for recipe answers, menu content, and cooking instructions. To compare nutrition across multiple dishes, use a table; if the process has branches, timers, or live state, use a dedicated cooking app.
en.why_valuable: Plain Markdown recipes easily mix ingredients with steps and obscure serving size and duration; this template establishes a stable hierarchy with a cover hero, meta badges, check-style ingredient list, and automatically numbered steps, while allowing an emoji or data:image cover with zero requests.

data_in.note: data is a key-value object for one recipe. cover accepts an emoji/short graphical string or a data:image/ embedded-image URI and does not load external URLs; coverAlt applies only to embedded images. time, servings, and difficulty are optional badge text. ingredients and steps are string arrays displayed in the supplied order as a check-style list and numbered steps.

schema.title: string -- recipe name; displays "Recipe" when empty
schema.description?: string -- one-line flavor or method summary below the title
schema.cover?: string -- emoji/short graphical text, or a data:image/ embedded cover; default 🍽️
schema.coverAlt?: string -- alternative text for an embedded cover
schema.coverLabel?: string -- short label overlaid at the bottom of the cover
schema.time?: string -- total-time badge, for example "30 min"
schema.servings?: string -- servings badge, for example "4 servings"
schema.ingredients: string[] -- ingredients shown in input order
schema.steps: string[] -- method steps, automatically numbered from 1

spec.note: On desktop the cover and summary form a two-column hero, followed by two ingredient/instruction columns; below 680px everything collapses to one column. Height grows naturally with the number of ingredients and steps, with no scrolling container.

data_in.note: data 是单道食谱键值对象。cover 接受 emoji/短图形文本或 data:image/ 内嵌图片 URI，不加载外部 URL；coverAlt 仅用于内嵌图片。time、servings、difficulty 是可选 badge 文本。ingredients 与 steps 都是字符串数组，分别按给定顺序显示为勾选列表和编号步骤。

schema.title: string —— 食谱名称；空值时显示 “Recipe”
schema.description?: string —— 标题下的一句口味或做法摘要
schema.cover?: string —— emoji/短图形文本，或 data:image/ 内嵌封面；默认 🍽️
schema.coverAlt?: string —— 内嵌封面的替代文本
schema.coverLabel?: string —— 叠加在封面底部的短说明
schema.time?: string —— 总耗时 badge，例如 “30 min”
schema.servings?: string —— 份量 badge，例如 “4 servings”
schema.ingredients: string[] —— 配料清单，按输入顺序显示
schema.steps: string[] —— 做法步骤，自动从 1 编号

spec.note: 桌面为封面/简介双栏 hero，下方配料/步骤双栏；680px 以下全部折为单列。高度随配料与步骤数量自然增长，不使用滚动容器。

example._why: 一份完整的柠檬香草意面包含封面、三个 meta badges、8 项配料和 5 个清晰步骤，足以检验桌面双栏与移动单列层级。

minimal.title: Lemon herb orzo
minimal.description: Silky one-pan orzo brightened with lemon, herbs and a little parmesan.
minimal.coverLabel: Bright, creamy and ready in one pan
ingredients: ¼ cup chopped parsley and dill
steps: Warm the olive oil in a wide pan and cook the garlic until fragrant.
Stir in the orzo for one minute so every grain is lightly coated.
Add the stock, simmer gently and stir often until the orzo is tender.
Fold in lemon zest, juice, parmesan and spinach until glossy.
Season well, scatter over the herbs and serve immediately.

uplink: 纯 display-only 组件，无 uplink；渲染结果只在当前 shadow root 中展示，不向 AI 或宿主回传状态。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
